parameters.jsCode:
const ec = $('Build Ingest SQL').first().json.eventCount || 0;
return [{ json: { ok: true, received: ec } }];

parameters.query: SELECT id, occurred_at, src_ip, method, path, status, user_agent, had_auth FROM dashboard_auth_events WHERE status IN (401, 403) AND occurred_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 500
SELECT src_ip, user_agent, path, had_auth, occurred_at FROM dashboard_auth_events WHERE status IN (401,403) AND occurred_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 2000
